summary: Over the past year, built a Telegram automation node for n8n, polished a Windows Explorer file-tagging utility, developed a personal CV/profile card generator, maintained Neovim dotfiles, and created a YOLO labeling tool.

items.title: Profile card generator
items.description: Developed a custom GitHub profile card generator with commit weighting and private repo discovery.

items.title: Profile cards and CV workflow
items.description: Set up automated CV timeline generation and light/dark theme adaptation for profile cards.

items.title: Mihomo fork proxy tuning
items.description: Re-exposed proxy APIs on a Clash.Meta fork to support FlClash integration.

items.title: Telegram n8n node fork
items.description: Iterated on CI fixes, authentication stability, and an album trigger feature for the TelePilot Telegram node.

items.title: File-tagging utility release prep
items.description: Prepared documentation, changelog, and Microsoft Store listing for the Intag Windows Explorer tagger.

items.title: Neovim config refinements
items.description: Fixed treesitter, LSP, and clipboard issues in personal Neovim setup, added secret detection hooks.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool development
items.description: Built a fast on-host image labeling tool with multi-select mark mode and batch operations.

items.title: Telegram node session fix
items.description: Resolved TDLib session storage issues and released version bumps for the n8n TelePilot node.

items.title: Explorer tagger v2 release
items.description: Launched v2 of the Windows file-tagging utility, adding metadata support and a Microsoft Store link.

items.title: Telegram node auth work
items.description: Started working on authentication improvements for the Telegram automation node.

items.title: Telegram node deployment and docs
items.description: Added Docker deployment support and updated README with fork features for the TelePilot node.

items.title: Telegram automation node foundation
items.description: Started the TelePilot Telegram node fork, laying ground-work with Docker support, Alpine builds, and initial CI.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging tool
items.description: Developed Intag, a file-tagging utility for Windows Explorer, adding CLI support, logging, and packaging.

items.title: Personal profile notes updates
items.description: Made minor README updates to personal GitHub notes.
